DECLARATION OF LLOYD DOUGLAS DIX IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO REINSTATE CASE TO ACTIVE FILE LIST (TRANSACTION ID # 100013573) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL COLLECTION CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL COLLECTION CORPORATION'S MOTION TO REINSTATE CASE TO ACTIVE FILE LIST PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 473(B), PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO REINSTATE CASE TO THE ACTIVE FILE LIST IS GRANTED, ALTHOUGH THE MOTION IS MISLABELED. THE CASE WILL NOT BE RESTORED TO AN "ACTIVE FILE LIST." RATHER, WHAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS AND WILL BE GRANTED IS A RENEWAL OF THE OCTOBER 17, 2005 JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN GOOD CAUSE FOR CONSIDERING ITS RECENT APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF THAT JUDGMENT AS HAVING BEEN FILED ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2015 AND THUS THE APPLICATION WILL BE TREATED AS HAVING BEEN MADE AS OF THAT DATE NUNC PRO TUNC. SO TREATED, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A RENEWAL OF THAT JUDGEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reinstate Case To Active File List Pursuant To Ccp ? 473(B)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRANDON TANG, ESQ., Tel No. 510-896-9411 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL COLLECTION CORPORATION'S Motion To Reinstate Case To Active File List Pursuant To CCP Sec. 473(B), Plaintiff's motion to reinstate case to the active file list is granted, although the motion is mislabeled. The case will not be restored to an "active file list." Rather, what plaintiff seeks and will be granted is a renewal of the October 17, 2005 judgment. Plaintiff has shown good cause for considering its recent application for renewal of that judgment as having been filed on September 18, 2015 and thus the application will be treated as having been made as of that date nunc pro tunc. So treated, plaintiff is entitled to a renewal of that judgement. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
